# Community Backend Phase 2 Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Add backend user-closure primitives: notification inbox, event notifications from existing user actions, and following feeds for posts and media.

**Architecture:** Store durable in-app notifications in a new `notification` table, generated by existing domain actions inside the same business flow where practical. Reuse `user_follow` to query followed authors, reuse existing public post/media response builders, and keep frontend notification UI out of this phase.

**Tech Stack:** Go, go-zero REST, go-zero sqlx, MySQL, existing auth/response helpers, source-level contract tests, focused Go unit tests.

---

### Task 1: Notification Model and API Contract

**Files:**
- Create: `model/notificationmodel.go`
- Modify: `internal/svc/servicecontext.go`
- Modify: `api/discover_world.api`
- Modify: `internal/types/types.go`
- Create: `internal/handler/notification/*.go`
- Create: `internal/logic/notification/*.go`
- Modify: `internal/handler/routes.go`
- Test: `model/notification_model_contract_test.go`
- Test: `internal/handler/notification_route_contract_test.go`
- Test: `internal/logic/notification/notification_contract_test.go`

- [ ] Add failing tests for model methods: `Insert`, `FindByRecipientBeforeID`, `CountUnread`, `MarkRead`, `MarkAllRead`.
- [ ] Add failing tests for JWT routes: `/notification/list/cursor`, `/notification/unread/count`, `/notification/read`, `/notification/read/all`.
- [ ] Implement notification model and service-context registration.
- [ ] Implement notification list/count/read/read-all logic and handlers.
- [ ] Run `go test ./model ./internal/handler ./internal/logic/notification -run Notification -count=1`.

### Task 2: Notification Events from Existing Actions

**Files:**
- Modify: `internal/logic/follow/createfollowlogic.go`
- Modify: `internal/logic/post/createpostcommentlogic.go`
- Modify: `internal/logic/post/togglepostreactionlogic.go`
- Modify: `internal/logic/post/togglepostfavoritelogic.go`
- Modify: `internal/logic/media/togglemediareactionlogic.go`
- Modify: `internal/logic/media/reviewmediaassetlogic.go`
- Test: `internal/logic/notification/notification_event_contract_test.go`

- [ ] Add failing source tests proving follow, post comment, post reaction, post favorite, media reaction, and media review insert notifications.
- [ ] Notify target user on first follow only.
- [ ] Notify post owner on comment, new reaction, and new favorite, excluding self-actions.
- [ ] Notify media owner on new media reaction, excluding self-actions.
- [ ] Notify media owner when admin review changes audit status.
- [ ] Run focused tests for changed packages.

### Task 3: Following Feed APIs

**Files:**
- Modify: `model/postmodel.go`
- Modify: `model/mediaassetmodel.go`
- Modify: `api/discover_world.api`
- Modify: `internal/types/types.go`
- Create: `internal/handler/feed/*.go`
- Create: `internal/logic/feed/*.go`
- Modify: `internal/handler/routes.go`
- Test: `model/following_feed_model_contract_test.go`
- Test: `internal/logic/feed/feed_contract_test.go`
- Test: `internal/handler/feed_route_contract_test.go`

- [ ] Add failing tests for `FindPublicByAuthorsBeforeCursor` on posts and media.
- [ ] Add failing route/type tests for `/feed/following/post/list/cursor` and `/feed/following/media/list/cursor`.
- [ ] Implement following post feed by loading followed IDs from `user_follow` and querying public active posts.
- [ ] Implement following media feed by loading followed IDs and querying public approved work media.
- [ ] Run `go test ./model ./internal/handler ./internal/logic/feed -run Feed -count=1`.

- [ ] Document `notification` table and existing-DB upgrade SQL.
- [ ] Document notification event types and following feed APIs.
- [ ] Run `go test ./...`.
